treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Graft from right thigh to right heel including debridement of approximately 12 cm²
treatment_information.treatment_response: Significant healing observed; mild pain associated with dressing changes

treatment_timeline.event: VAC placed over the wound before last discharge
VAC removed in clinic today; wound appeared more superficial and has healed significantly
Coumadin stopped in preparation for procedure

patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Out of bed with assistance to chair or wheelchair
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Denies fevers/chills; pain described as mild
